purpose: Main WinForms window hosting a WebView2 control that loads the Matrix Digital Rain web app; handles window sizing, foreground enforcement, keyboard exit, display change events, and WebView2 navigation security.
called_by: Program.cs — instantiated and passed to Application.Run
calls_out_to: AppCli.Parse — parses command-line flags into AppOptions
MatrixArgs.BuildQueryString — builds URL query string from passthrough args
invariants: WebView2 navigates to https://appassets.local/index.html with the query string appended
Navigation to external URLs is blocked (NewWindowRequestedEventArgs.Handled=true, NavigationStartingEventArgs.Cancel=true for non-appassets URLs)
Background is black to avoid bright flash during WebView2 initialization
gotchas: WebView2 initialization is async (EnsureCoreWebView2Async); window sizing and hook installation happen before WebView is ready
CatastrophicFailureHResult (0x8000FFFF) from WebView2 triggers a user-visible error and graceful exit rather than a crash
Foreground enforcer timer retries for a few ticks then self-disposes to avoid keeping the process alive longer than needed
_cachedUserDataFolder is static to reuse the same WebView2 user data folder across multiple MainForm instances (shouldn't normally be more than one)
